title: dtrace security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[2.0.6-1]
- Fix dtprobed unsafe probe description handling (CVE-2026-21991).
  [Orabug: 39054018]

  Credit Statement
  The following people or organizations reported security vulnerabilities addressed by this ELSA to Oracle:
    Dhiraj Mishra: CVE-2026-21991
